description: Email correspondence — extract header fields, participants, and key content

fields.name: from_name
fields.prompt: Extract the display name of the email sender (not the email address itself). Return null if only an address is shown.

fields.name: to_addresses
fields.prompt: Extract all recipient email addresses from the To: field as a JSON array of strings.

fields.name: cc_addresses
fields.prompt: Extract all CC email addresses as a JSON array of strings. Return empty array if none.

fields.name: date_sent
fields.prompt: Extract the email sent date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Use the Date: header if present.

fields.name: time_sent
fields.prompt: Extract the time the email was sent in HH:MM format (24-hour). Return null if not determinable.

fields.name: thread_topic
fields.prompt: Extract the thread or conversation topic — usually the subject line with Re: / Fwd: prefixes stripped. Return null if single email.

fields.name: body_summary
fields.prompt: Summarise the email body in one to three sentences. Focus on the main request, information, or action items.

fields.name: action_items
fields.prompt: Extract any explicit action items, requests, or deadlines from the email body as a JSON array of strings. Return empty array if none.

fields.name: attachments
fields.prompt: Extract attachment filenames or descriptions mentioned in the email as a JSON array of strings. Return empty array if none.
